seoTitle: Evergreen vs Everton Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Evergreen and Everton Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Evergreen vs Everton Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Evergreen and Everton Park.
heading: Evergreen vs Everton Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Evergreen, Queensland and Everton Park, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Everton Park has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Evergreen (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Evergreen or Everton Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Evergreen has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Everton Park scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Evergreen scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Everton Park scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Evergreen or Everton Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Everton Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
